overall.description: First-person motorcycle gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring high-speed navigation through a rain-slicked neon cyberpunk metropolis at night. The player drives from elevated highways through dense commercial districts with holographic billboards, navigating intersections and traffic before crashing into a flooded alleyway.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated cyberpunk highway with red neon barriers

agents.ego_description: riding motorcycle at high speed along elevated highway toward a towering purple-lit skyscraper

entered.detail: red illuminated barrier running along the left side of the elevated roadway
red illuminated barrier running along the right side of the elevated roadway
tall skyscraper with distinctive purple neon lighting at the top, visible in the distance
modern glass facade building with illuminated windows alongside the highway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated cyberpunk highway at night, with the player riding a motorcycle between red neon-lit barriers. A massive purple-lit tower dominates the distant skyline while modern glass buildings line the left side of the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: major urban intersection with neon commercial buildings

events.description: descends from elevated highway to street level, entering a dense commercial intersection
navigates through intersection, passing a purple station wagon on the left

agents.ego_description: slowing slightly to navigate the intersection while maintaining speed through the turn

notable_agents.action: purple station wagon driving parallel to the motorcycle through the intersection

entered.detail: commercial building with prominent green neon signage and glass facade
yellow striped pedestrian crosswalk marking the major intersection
large illuminated advertising screen displaying commercial content

segments.scene_description: The player descends from the elevated highway into a bustling commercial intersection marked by yellow crosswalks. A green neon-lit building appears on the left while the motorcycle navigates through moderate traffic, passing a purple station wagon. Digital billboards illuminate the right side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial district with holographic advertisements

events.description: overtakes a yellow taxi cab on the right side
swerves slightly to avoid traffic while maintaining high speed

agents.ego_description: weaving through traffic at high speed, overtaking vehicles and navigating the neon-lit commercial corridor

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi cab driving ahead, then overtaken by the motorcycle

entered.detail: large commercial building with prominent 'FOURTH WALL' signage in blue neon
large floating holographic advertisement displaying animated content
cylindrical tower structure with vertical purple neon lighting

segments.scene_description: Driving through the dense commercial heart of the city, the player overtakes a yellow taxi while passing the iconic 'FOURTH WALL' building on the left. Holographic billboards and neon cylindrical towers dominate the skyline as the motorcycle weaves through heavy traffic.

events.description: turns right at intersection, entering street with large overpass structure ahead
passes under large overpass structure with reduced lighting

agents.ego_description: making a right turn at the intersection then accelerating under an overpass, navigating around other vehicles

notable_agents.action: blue sedan merging into the lane from the right side

entered.detail: large red illuminated sign reading 'Watson' suspended over the street
massive concrete and steel overpass with integrated lighting fixtures
building-sized digital display showing animated advertisements

segments.scene_description: After turning right at a busy intersection, the player drives toward a massive overpass marked by a red 'Watson' sign. Large digital screens cover the buildings on the left while the motorcycle passes underneath the shadowy overpass structure, transitioning into a slightly darker urban zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial alleyway with graffiti and utility structures

events.description: enters narrow alleyway with industrial piping and graffiti-covered walls
lighting dims significantly as the motorcycle moves deeper into the enclosed alley

agents.ego_description: navigating tight turns through a narrow alley, slowing to avoid obstacles and walls

entered.detail: exposed green and silver utility pipes running along the alley wall
concrete wall covered in colorful neon graffiti art and tags
red and white striped concrete barriers lining the left side of the narrow path
wooden and metal crates stacked along the right wall of the alley

segments.scene_description: The player turns into a narrow industrial alleyway, leaving the main street behind. Exposed green piping runs along the left wall while vibrant graffiti covers the right. The lighting dims significantly as the motorcycle navigates between concrete barriers and stacked crates in this enclosed urban corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded alleyway with debris and industrial waste

events.description: motorcycle drives off the road into a flooded area with water splashing
vehicle slows dramatically while navigating through deep water and debris

agents.ego_description: losing control and driving into a flooded section of the alley, splashing through water and debris

entered.detail: large flooded section of the alley with reflective water surface covering the ground
scattered rocks and concrete debris partially submerged in the water
large colorful mural painted on the far alley wall depicting abstract designs

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the motorcycle crashing into a flooded section of the alley, sending water splashing up. The ground becomes completely submerged as the player navigates through debris and rocks. A large graffiti mural is visible on the far wall as the vehicle slows in the dark, water-filled corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous high-speed journey from an elevated neon highway down into the dark, flooded depths of an industrial alleyway. It begins atop a rain-slicked highway between red neon barriers, moving toward a distant purple tower before descending into a bustling commercial intersection filled with yellow crosswalks and green-lit architecture. As the motorcycle weaves through heavy traffic and past the Fourth Wall building, the environment shifts from open roads to a dense urban heart dominated by holographic billboards and cylindrical towers. The scene then turns right toward a massive overpass marked by a red Watson sign, passing under its shadow into a darker zone before veering into a narrow alleyway lined with green piping and vibrant graffiti. Finally, the camera plunges into a flooded section of the corridor, sending water splashing upward as the vehicle slows amidst debris and a large mural.
